title: dracula pileus
intro: Dracula pileus, also known as the vampire's hat, is a rare species of epiphytic orchid native to Ecuador. It is prized for its unique, reddish-brown, helmet-shaped flowers with a distinctive lip, resembling a vampire's hat. Traditionally, the Dracula pileus has been used in folk medicine for its potential antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, and it is also believed to have cardiovascular benefits due to its flavonoid content. Herbal preparations of Dracula pileus can be made into infusions, tinctures, or capsules, and are thought to promote relaxation, reduce blood pressure, and boost the immune system.
